basic_details.job_title: KRL General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Kerala Rubber (KRL) General Manager - Technical Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of KRL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KRL General Manager - Technical Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in chemistry or Polymer Chemistry or Polymer/Rubber Technology or Chemical Engineering
qualification.details: Master's degree in chemistry or Polymer Chemistry or Polymer/Rubber Technology or Chemical Engineering.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KRL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KRL General Manager – Technical recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the KRL General Manager – Technical post is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Manager – Technical post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in chemistry or Polymer Chemistry or Polymer/Rubber Technology or Chemical Engineering to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the General Manager – Technical position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the General Manager – Technical post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Manager – Technical role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 115,700 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the General Manager – Technical post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the General Manager – Technical position in Kerala Rubber (KRL).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the KRL General Manager – Technical recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the General Manager – Technical post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Manager – Technical post will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the KRL General Manager – Technical recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Kerala Rubber (KRL) for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment is www.cmd.kerala.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for the KRL General Manager – Technical recruitment is KRL/CMD/002/2026.
